chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit 1065 of 2023 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date: Order with signature of the Judge -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For orders on CMA No.11902/2024 16.09.2024 Dr. Shahab Imam, advocate for the plaintiff Messrs. Waleed Khalid and Shahid Iqbal Rana, advocates Mr. Tahir Khalil advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhabat Hussain Awan, advocate for defendant Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General This suit, filed in the year 2023, seeks a declaration that the plaintiff is entitled for exemption under the Customs Act and the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Upon specific query as to whether any G.D. has been filed, none could be demonstrated. Since no G.D. was filed no specific denial of any sort by the FBR is apparent. The remaining prayer clauses seek orders with respect to EMCO Industries Limited, the said entity has not even been impleaded herein. In view hereof the plaintiff has failed to demonstrate a cause of action, therefore, in exercise of powers pursuant to Order VII Rule 11 (a), the plaint is rejected. Judge Amjad
